title: Senior Frontend Developer
description:
Job Description

We are looking for an experienced Senior Frontend Developer to join our team at TechVision UAE. You will be responsible for overseeing various projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and driving innovation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the development and implementation of key strategies.
  • Collaborate closely with internal stakeholders.
  • Ensure compliance with company standards and industry regulations.

Requirements

  • Minimum 5 years of experience in a similar role.
  • Excellent communication and leadership skills.
  • Bachelor's degree in a relevant field.

title: HR Manager
description:
Job Description

We are seeking an HR Manager to oversee HR operations, manage employee relations, and ensure compliance with labor laws.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage recruitment and onboarding processes.
  • Develop and implement HR policies.
  • Resolve employee conflicts and issues.

Requirements

  • Minimum 7 years of HR experience.
  • Strong knowledge of UAE labor laws.
  • Bachelor's degree in Human Resources.

title: Data Scientist
description:
Job Description

Join our AI team to build predictive models and analyze complex datasets.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop machine learning models.
  • Analyze large datasets for insights.
  • Collaborate with engineering teams to deploy models.

Requirements

  • Master's degree in Data Science or related field.
  • Proficiency in Python and SQL.
  • Experience with deep learning frameworks.
